title: Prioria novoguineensis
taxonomy: Prioria novoguineensis is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is a tree native to New Guinea. The classification of Prioria novoguineensis places it in the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. At the rank of order, it falls under the Rosales. This tree is closely related to other species within the genus Prioria.
